crime.value: Multiple murders at pharmacies with theft of chemicals/pills, and disappearance of a mineral
crime.quote: over the past few months, there have been four murders in this area of Bermuda...all of these murders were done at or around, pharmacies

victim.value: Multiple pharmacy-related victims and possibly Gerald (shot by sniper)
victim.quote: He shot from the top story, story four. It was the second from the left

closed_world.value: Bermuda Triangle area - a crime-free region where unusual events are contained
closed_world.quote: four murders in this area of Bermuda. This is very interesting since it is genuinely crime free

culprit_and_motive.value: Albert Guss as murderer, possibly connected to Henry Downing, motive related to chemical theft
culprit_and_motive.quote: Albert Guss had a lot of chemicals and pills around his house...he already killed someone

investigator.value: I.D.I. agents Andrew and Gerald investigating the crimes
investigator.quote: Andrew and Gerald ran into the hotel lobby, there I.D.I. cards flashing ahead of them

suspect_architecture.value: Multiple suspects across connected crimes: Albert Guss (direct murderer), Henry Downing (potential influence/mastermind), plus unknown perpetrators of four pharmacy murders with similar M.O.
suspect_architecture.quote: What I mainly want to know is that supposing Albert Guss killed all these people, if Henry Downing influenced

red_herring.value: The Bermuda Triangle mystery framing may be misdirection from pharmaceutical theft pattern - investigators worry they're chasing a red herring
red_herring.quote: We might just be chasing a red herring for all we know. Hopefully this is not so

clue_fairness.value: Chemical evidence at Albert Guss's house available to reader before investigators analyze connection to pharmacy murders
clue_fairness.quote: I noticed that Albert Guss had a lot of chemicals and pills around his house

social_world.value: Law enforcement hierarchy: I.D.I. agents coordinating with local police, Crime Scene Investigators, institutional jurisdictions
social_world.quote: Andrew and Gerald ran into the hotel lobby, there I.D.I. cards flashing ahead of them

reveal_mechanic.value: Physical evidence analysis pending from Crime Scene Investigators to link pharmaceutical thefts to mineral disappearance
reveal_mechanic.quote: It will take some time still till the Crime Scene Investigators will be able to tell us if they found any

media_and_audience.value: Bermuda Triangle folklore provides supernatural framework for interpreting disappearances in genuinely crime-free area
media_and_audience.quote: four murders in this area of Bermuda. This is very interesting since it is genuinely crime free

investigator_wound.value: Financial desperation and health issues affecting Joseph Farrow's judgment and physical capability during investigation
investigator_wound.quote: His large amount of doctor's bills was actually the main reason he was out here tonight, sleeping in his boat

_meta.title: ebook arthur limbada lost at sea
